jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - NHPC - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
NHPC is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NHPC:
NHPC is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NHPC!
